failedAssertions.reason: No dedicated red sync-failure toast observed. Connection failure shows yellow warning toast instead.
Conflict detection badge not visible in UI; no pending conflicts exist in system to trigger it.
Conflict resolution dialog not accessible because no conflicts exist in system.
Sync Settings page lacks queue statistics display. Backend API exists but UI only shows basic module config.
No retry buttons visible for failed items in Sync Settings UI. Backend retry API exists but not exposed.
No sync progress indicator (progress bar or percentage) visible in UI during active sync.
No 'Bersihkan' (clear queue) button in Sync Settings UI. Backend clearSyncQueue exists but not exposed.
Cannot test conflict detection across areas because no sync conflicts exist in the system.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: Electron Desktop App section with CDP connection instructions, isolation rules, and shared state warnings
No changes needed - services started successfully after TypeScript fixes
Fixed TypeScript compilation errors: made revision module-specific fields optional in allRevisions type, added union types for revision lookups, added remote-debugging-port flag
Fixed dynamic sql.js import in importUserDatabase to properly initialize before creating Database
